title: Egghead Falls Under Siege
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Vegapunk, Nami, Luffy, Saturn, Lucci as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: KyaA!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: Wide-Ispered Adistur- Dance on Egghead!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Master Atlas was defeated!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Intruders!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are the Cipher Pol causing a ruckus here?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: UWA! It's Rob Lucci!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Those guys are really going after vegapunk...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why are you here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Pigeon Guy???

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: This is a government island you know...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, that's right! It's US being here that's weird!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's hurry up and escape to the top, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How freaking irritating! It's Da Straw hat crew!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Jewelry Bonney is also there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But even so, don't lay a hand on them Lucci...

dialogue.speaker: Lucci
dialogue.text: Now that "Straw hat" became a yonko...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must't fight him, not without permission from Da Top Brass!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll leave Bonney to you, jinbei!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Whoa there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's true. Considering there are those that are subordinates to a yonko. A simple skirmish will turn out into an all out war!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Report this immediately to the Marines!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes, mamm!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Whoa!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is terrible! It's the girl from before!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm well aware that fighting them is not a good idea but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Please look after her, chopper!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Okay! But I think frankly is more suited to this kind of job, not me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Keep your mouth shut. This is an internal govern-ment issue...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Anyone needs

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This girl...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She gave us meals to eat, you know!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
